Hi. Good to see you. Welcome to X-Kick.\I will check something before going toward playing game. Come with me.
Variety positions are in X-KICK.\Then, let's look at the positions of X-KICK.
In this class,\let's study about the offensive & defensive areas with the playground image.
The area painted with yellow is for 'Short shot' and 'Heading shot'.\FW position can make a goal easily with 'Short shot' & "Heading shot' there.
The area painted with yellow is for 'Long shot'.\MF position can make a goal easily with 'Long shot' there.
Those areas painted with yellow for 'Ball crossing'.\If your 'Crossing' ability is higher, you can deliver a ball to your FW players easier.
That is the defensive area.\You can do 'Stealing' and 'Tackling' in any places.\But 'Ball clearing' is only possible on the area painted with yellow above.
Lastly, letˇŻs check the control keys for X-Kick.
But donˇŻt worry too much~!\There is the key customized option. So you can change the keys as you want,\when you need freely.
Couldn't gain the card because of\inconsistency in the conditions.
ˇş%sˇ», What a nice shot!\Do you like FW position?\It's the position to make the goal. Isn't nice?
ˇş%sˇ», What a nice pass!\Do you lke MF position?\This position involved in both Striker & Defender positions.
ˇş%sˇ», What a nice defense!\Do you like DF position?\It's the position not to lose the goal. Isn't great?
Let's practice the basic skills.\SHOOTING, LONG PASS and THROUGH PASS need delicate control
It's just a snap, try it yourself!!\Press A/D/F key while you are with ball, the gauge will go up\Press A/D/F key once again, the gauge will stop and you will\hit the ball.
Wow!!\Excellent!!\Let's move on to the next step.
No, that's not!\You made mistake, right? It's basic of the basic!\Would you like to see my demonstration once again?
Goal is an essential condition for victory.\Let's practice hard for powerful and exact shooting\See how I make a goal~
That's easy job, try it yourself!!\Press D/F key while you are with ball, than the gauge will go up\Press D/F key once again, the gauge will stop and you will hit\the ball.
The basic of football is PASSING, isn't it?\Let's practice SHORT PASS\This time also, I'll give you a demonstration first, and follow me.
What a simple! Try it yourself!!
This time, let's practice TACKLING.\Take the ball from opponents player by tackle\Be close to opponents player as much as and try!\Follow me.
Press the key once again, when the gauge meets the blue arrow.
Try to shoot the ball with the key showing on the goal net.
Try to pass the ball to AI player with pressing A or S key while\you are with ball.
Try to tackle to AI player which have a ball with pressing Q key

Let's look at the 1st position changing.\When you meet Lv.5,\you can choose the basic position among FW, MF and DF.\Also the basic positions will be divided into the specific positions again, when you meet the Lv.20
Character abiliy and skills are totally different\depending on the character position and level.
